# Venkata Pagadala — Portfolio

> AI Product Manager — Search (SEO, GEO) at AT&T
> Building & Enhancing Existing Systems using AI, Automation Workflows, Gen AI, Agentic AI Agents, LLMs, MCP, A2A, RAG, Enterprise SEO, Technical SEO & Growth

## About

Venkata Pagadala is the Lead Technical Product Manager (Automation, AI & SEO) at AT&T. He specializes in enterprise-scale AI systems, knowledge graphs, RAG engines, and technical SEO infrastructure managing 50M+ pages.

## Expertise

- AI Product Management
- Enterprise SEO & Technical SEO
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- AI Agents & Workflow Automation
- RAG Engines & Knowledge Graphs
- MCP Server Integrations
- A2A Agent Pipelines
- Programmatic SEO at Scale
- Editorial SEO & Content Strategy
- Performance Analytics & Growth Forecasting

## Education

- Disruptive Strategy — Harvard Business School
- Cybersecurity — MIT
- MSCS — New England College

## Solutions

- AI Product: AI Agents, Custom AI/ML Pipelines, RAG Engines, Knowledge Graphs, MCP Servers, A2A Pipelines
- AEO: AI Visibility Tracking, AI Search Prioritization, AI-Focused Content Strategy
- Technical SEO: Visibility Audits, Internal Linking, Architecture & Crawlability, International SEO, Site Migrations
- Programmatic SEO: Scalable Page Templates, High-Volume Page Generation, Indexation Logic
- Editorial SEO: Topical Authority, Persona Mapping, User Intent Research, Content Briefs
- Performance: Growth Forecasting, Custom Reporting, KPI Tracking, CRO Audits

## AI Notebook — Curated Knowledge Hub

### Top 100 AI Contributors 2026
The authoritative directory of 100 AI pioneers shaping the field in 2026. Explore profiles, research timelines, glossary, and curated reading lists.
- URL: https://venkatapagadala.com/notebook/ai

### AI Learning Roadmap — Zero to Hero (2026)
A structured 18-week curriculum with 24 topics, 67+ videos, 71+ courses, 62+ repos, 43+ books, and pro tips. Your complete path from beginner to advanced.
- URL: https://venkatapagadala.com/notebook/ai/roadmap

### AI Concepts Encyclopedia (2026)
110 AI concepts across 10 categories with key terms, prerequisites, difficulty levels, and curated learn-more links. The definitive AI reference guide.
- URL: https://venkatapagadala.com/notebook/ai/encyclopedia
